title: MeetGeek integration
excerpt:
Hi ! 
We are using MeetGeek as an AI for meeting summary and it will be great to have them directly on Monday. 
Does anyone is using this app ?

posts.author: v.segura (Virginie)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi !
We are using MeetGeek as an AI for meeting summary and it will be great to have them directly on Monday.
Does anyone is using this app ?

posts.author: Darya (Darya Nazarava)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Virginie,
MeetGeek + Monday supports native integration - https://meetgeek.ai/integrations/monday-com

So you can sync meeting summaries or just highlights from MeetGeek to Monday with a one-click setup. Here is the link to the guide with details.
